title: Agent Manifest
description: Schema for agent manifest files that define an agent's identity, capabilities, tools, and constraints.

version.description: Semantic version of the agent manifest

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose

domain.description: Domain the agent operates in (e.g., odoo_sh, platform, cross-functional)

persona_ref.description: Path to the persona YAML file this agent implements

capabilities.description: List of capability identifiers this agent supports

tools.description: List of tools this agent is allowed to invoke

guardrails.description: Safety and policy guardrails enforced at runtime

routing.description: Routing hints consumed by the orchestrator
